    Constructor CadRasterImage

    Initializes a new instance of the CadRasterImage class.

    Type Condition
    ArgumentNullException

    Thrown when one of arguments is null
    ArgumentException

    Thrown when CadRasterImageDef.ObjectHandle is null or empty
